title: signin with valid credentials
description: Test POST /api/v1/user/auth/signin with valid email+password. Expect 200 with accessToken, refreshToken and user profile (status=success).

title: signin with invalid password
description: Test POST /api/v1/user/auth/signin with a valid email but wrong password. Expect 400 with error message 'Invalid email/password!'.

title: refresh token signin with valid token
description: Test POST /api/v1/user/auth/rt-signin with a valid refreshToken. Expect 200 with new accessToken and refreshToken.

title: refresh token signin with invalid token
description: Test POST /api/v1/user/auth/rt-signin with an expired/invalid refreshToken. Expect 400 with error about refresh token missing/expired/invalid.

title: signup with valid payload
description: Test POST /api/v1/user/auth/signup with valid payload (name, email, password, agreedTermsOfService=true). Expect 201 with accessToken, refreshToken and user object.

title: signup with terms not agreed
description: Test POST /api/v1/user/auth/signup with agreedTermsOfService=false. Expect 400 with message about agreeing to terms.

title: get all quizzes with valid auth
description: Test GET /api/v1/quiz/ with valid Bearer token. Expect 200 with array of quizzes (status=success).

title: get quiz data for attempt with attemptable quiz
description: Test GET /api/v1/quiz/attempt/:id with Bearer token for an attemptable quiz. Expect 200 with quiz questions and answers but without isCorrect fields (sanitized for student).

title: get quiz data for attempt with non-attemptable quiz
description: Test GET /api/v1/quiz/attempt/:id for a quiz that is not attemptable. Expect 400 with message 'Quiz not attemptable'.

title: post attempt with valid answer
description: Test POST /api/v1/attempt/ with Bearer token and valid payload (userID, questionID, answerIDList JSON string with at least one answer UUID). Expect 200 with message 'Attempt created successfully!' and data array.

title: post attempt with empty answer list
description: Test POST /api/v1/attempt/ with empty answerIDList. Expect 400 with message 'Please provide an answer!'.

title: post attempt duplicate question attempt
description: Test POST /api/v1/attempt/ selecting an answer already attempted by this user for this question. Expect 400 with message 'You have already attempted this question!'.

title: update attempt duration
description: Test PATCH /api/v1/attemptduration/quiz/:quizID with Bearer token and valid payload (quizID path, userID, duration integer). Expect 200 with updated AttemptDuration object.

title: get attempt duration
description: Test GET /api/v1/attemptduration/quiz/:quizID with Bearer token and userID query. Expect 200 with AttemptDuration record or null.

title: post site visit anonymous
description: Test POST /api/v1/sitevisit/ (no auth) with payload (page, path, capturedAt). Expect 201 with created SiteVisit.

title: get admin analytics
description: Test GET /api/v1/analytics/admin with admin Bearer token. Expect 200 with admin analytics summary (status=success).

title: get user analytics
description: Test GET /api/v1/analytics/user with Bearer token and userID query. Expect 200 with user analytics object.

title: get users with ranks
description: Test GET /api/v1/ranking/users with admin Bearer token. Expect 200 with list of users and computed rank metrics.

title: post sats reward address
description: Test POST /api/v1/satsreward/address with Bearer token and payload (userID, address). Expect 201 with created SatsRewardAddress.

title: post sats reward address duplicate
description: Test POST /api/v1/satsreward/address with duplicate address. Expect 400 with duplicate address error.

title: make default sats reward address
description: Test PATCH /api/v1/satsreward/address/:id/default with Bearer token. Expect 200 with updated address (previous default cleared).

title: claim quiz sats reward completed quiz
description: Test POST /api/v1/satsreward/claim-quiz with Bearer token and valid payload (userID, quizID) when user has completed quiz and has verified default Lightning address. Expect 201 with SatsReward record.

title: claim quiz sats reward not completed
description: Test POST /api/v1/satsreward/claim-quiz when user hasn't completed quiz. Expect 400 with message 'Quiz not completed by user'.

title: get certificate claim status
description: Test GET /api/v1/certificate/:id/claim-status/user/:userID with Bearer token. Expect 200 with data {claimed: boolean, certificateAwarded: object|null}.

title: claim certificate prerequisites not met
description: Test POST /api/v1/certificate/claim when user has not completed prerequisites. Expect 400 with message 'User has not completed all required quizzes'.

title: post ai preview admin
description: Test POST /api/v1/aipreview/ with admin Bearer token and payload (questionID, prompt, summary). Expect 201 with created AIPreview.

title: get ai preview for question non admin
description: Test GET /api/v1/aipreview/question/:questionID with Bearer token (non-admin). Expect 200 with only the default preview for the question.

title: make default ai preview
description: Test PATCH /api/v1/aipreview/:id/default with admin Bearer token. Expect 200 with updated AIPreview and previous default cleared.

title: health check endpoint
description: Test GET /health endpoint. Expect 200 with health status response.

title: create question with duplicate sequence number
description: Test POST /api/v1/question/ with admin Bearer token and a sequenceNumber that already exists for the same quiz. Expect 400 with duplicate sequenceNumber error.

title: create answer with missing required fields
description: Test POST /api/v1/answer/ with admin Bearer token and missing required fields. Expect 400 with missing fields error.

title: get all answers by question
description: Test GET /api/v1/answer/question/:questionID with Bearer token. Expect 200 with ordered answers array.

title: get question with answers and attachments
description: Test GET /api/v1/question/:id with Bearer token. Expect 200 with question plus answers and attachments.
